attribute_details.name: Registration and contracting
attribute_details.expected: Resource must be fully registered and contracted: complete the New Resource Implementation (NRI) process, have a Scheduling Coordinator (SC), and execute required agreements (e.g., Participating Generator Agreement).
attribute_details.agent_value: Says resource must be modeled/registered in CAISO systems and the Scheduling Coordinator must have resource properly set up (resource parameters, limits, ancillary-service capability). Does not mention New Resource Implementation (NRI) or execution of required agreements (e.g., Participating Generator Agreement).

attribute_details.name: Metering and telemetry standards
attribute_details.expected: Install ISO‑certified revenue‑quality meters and provide direct real‑time telemetry to CAISO's EMS for fast response and accurate control.
attribute_details.agent_value: States requirement to provide real-time telemetry to monitor output/response, calculate performance, and operate AGC reliably; references compliance with CAISO telemetry standards. Does not state requirement for ISO-certified revenue-quality meters explicitly.

attribute_details.name: Ancillary‑service technical certification and performance
attribute_details.expected: Obtain ancillary service (regulation) certification including documented control/protection settings and completed Generator Resource Data Template (GRDT); demonstrate ability to follow Dispatch Operating Point (DOP) and meet CAISO regulation performance standards.
attribute_details.agent_value: Mentions meeting CAISO minimum performance expectations, testing/recertification concepts, and ability to follow AGC/CAISO dispatch instructions. Does not mention GRDT or documented control/protection settings explicitly, nor the specific certification artifacts named in the expected attribute.

attribute_details.name: Resource‑type specific requirements
attribute_details.expected: Comply with resource‑type rules: for storage maintain sufficient state of charge to sustain awarded regulation (e.g., 30 minutes at awarded level); for demand response/PDRs/DERs meet Net Benefits Test, Sub‑LAP mapping, proper resource IDs and aggregation structures as defined in the BPM.
attribute_details.agent_value: Specifically calls out limited-energy resources/storage must manage state-of-charge/energy limits and refers to regulation energy management concepts. Does not state the 30-minute SOC expectation or details for demand response/PDRs/DERs such as Net Benefits Test, Sub-LAP mapping, resource IDs, or aggregation structure rules.
